content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Toptal: Marketing Data Scientist Anywhere in the World 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, and 🇲🇽 Mexico California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5340/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <div> <h3>Job Description</h3> <p>We are seeking a Marketing Data Scientist to support and enhance internally built marketing ROI and analytics platform. This role focuses on analyzing marketing effectiveness, optimizing ad spend, and building scalable data science solutions using Python and statistical modeling techniques. The ideal candidate will have experience working with time series data, marketing analytics, and modern Python data science libraries, along with strong software engineering fundamentals.</p> <h3>Tasks &amp; Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li>Develop and maintain marketing ROI and analytics models</li> <li>Analyze marketing and sales data to measure channel performance and advertising effectiveness</li> <li>Partner with business stakeholders to address questions, review model outputs, and identify key business drivers behind marketing performance results</li> <li>Work with Bayesian and linear models to evaluate marketing contribution and ROI</li> <li>Support and improve Streamlit-based applications used for reporting and visualization</li> <li>Build scalable Python-based data workflows and analytical tools</li> <li>Export and manage reporting outputs using Excel and related formats</li> <li>Collaborate with engineering and cross-functional teams to improve code quality and maintainability</li> <li>Work within AWS environments including S3 and EC2</li> <li>Monitor applications and workflows using DataDog</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>Engagement highlights:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Immediate contribution to a live ML application with clear ownership</li> <li>Deep collaboration with domain experts and applied data teams</li> <li>Opportunities to apply and grow expertise in both model development and deployment workflows</li> <li>Overlap till 3pm CST needed</li> </ul> </div> <h2>Requirements</h2> <div> <h3>Required Skills</h3> <ul> <li>Strong Python programming experience</li> <li>Experience with:</li> <ul> <li>Pandas</li> <li>NumPy</li> <li>PyTest</li> <li>Streamlit</li> </ul> <li>Experience working with time series data</li> <li>Understanding of statistical modeling techniques including Bayesian and linear models</li> <li>Knowledge of software engineering best practices</li> <li>Experience with AWS services such as S3 and EC2</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)</li> <li>Experience in marketing analytics or ad-tech environments</li> <li>Familiarity with ROI optimization and attribution modeling</li> <li>Exposure to DataDog or similar monitoring tools</li> <li>Spanish proficiency is a plus</li> </ul> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-marketing-data-scientist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-marketing-data-scientist</a></p> Wed, 27 May 2026 15:24:12 +0000 Fri, 26 Jun 2026 15:24:12 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-marketing-data-scientist https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toptal-marketing-data-scientist Lula Commerce: Senior Financial Analyst Anywhere in the World Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5339/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.lulacommerce.com">https://www.lulacommerce.com</a> </p> <h1><strong>Senior Financial Analyst</strong></h1><h2><strong>About Lula</strong></h2><p>Convenience stores are the most underserved vertical in digital commerce — and we're fixing that. Lula is the commerce platform built exclusively for c-store operators, powering digital ordering, delivery, and in-store commerce for 75+ regional chains across 3,000+ locations. We've processed 10M+ orders and our products — Lula Hub, Lula Direct, and Lula Solo — help convenience stores compete as modern, omnichannel retailers.</p><h2><strong>The Role</strong></h2><p>We're hiring our first dedicated Senior Financial Analyst to own the financial operations of a fast-growing SaaS and marketplace business. You'll be the person who knows where every dollar is coming from, where it's going, and what it means for where we're headed.</p><p>Reporting directly to the CEO with day-to-day partnership from our fractional CFO, you'll own revenue forecasting, billing, collections, monthly close, and the board reporting that shapes our decisions. This isn't a role for someone who wants to maintain a finance function — it's for someone who wants to build one.</p><h2><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h2><p><em><strong>Revenue &amp; Forecasting</strong></em></p><ul><li><p>Build and maintain forecasting models across subscription, revenue-share (GMV-based), and project-based revenue streams</p></li><li><p>Model new customer cohorts, ramp assumptions, and ARPU trends</p></li><li><p>Reconcile revenue across Stripe, ACH, and partner payouts (Grubhub, ExtraMile, and others)</p></li><li><p>Partner with Sales and Account Management to translate pipeline into a credible revenue forecast</p></li></ul><p><em><strong>Monthly Close &amp; Reporting</strong></em></p><ul><li><p>Own the monthly P&amp;L in partnership with our outsourced accounting team</p></li><li><p>Produce monthly financial packages for leadership and the board</p></li><li><p>Build and maintain KPI dashboards: ARR, ARPU, gross margin, burn, runway, CAC, and others</p></li><li><p>Reforecast against actuals as the business evolves</p></li></ul><p><em><strong>Billing, AR &amp; Collections</strong></em></p><ul><li><p>Own end-to-end invoicing and collections across SaaS subscriptions, rev-share invoices, and project billing</p></li><li><p>Manage failed payments, dunning, and account suspension policies</p></li><li><p>Migrate remaining legacy per-order customers onto subscription billing</p></li><li><p>Investigate and resolve billing discrepancies with customers and vendors</p></li></ul><p><em><strong>Cash &amp; Banking</strong></em></
